programme.title: Louisiana Lockdown
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Slater balances his prison duties with his responsibilities as a single father; former rodeo champ Cracker risks serious injury for another shot at glory; a local newspaper launches a smear campaign against Warden Cain.

programme.title: Louisiana Lockdown
programme.desc: The convicts prepare for the final rodeo of the season; inmate James learns that he has been granted early release from Angola.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters, and the wardens must handle an unruly captain; when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help; the wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog; a drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: It's the opening of deer and oyster season in Texas and Game Wardens find illegal undersized oysters; in East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps; an owl is rescued from a chicken coop and set free.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Must Love Cats
programme.desc: An Oregon woman teaches cats how to swim; a San Francisco artisan designs jewelry made out of cat fur; John visits a Los Angeles cat hotel; inventors showcase their improvements on the litter box.

programme.title: Must Love Cats
programme.sub-title: Kitty Kidney Transplants and the Cat Who Jogs
programme.desc: A chef in the Hamptons cooks gourmet meals for felines; a New Jersey fashion designer creates kitty couture.

programme.desc: Bindi and the family plan an emotional surprise for Terri in the Crocoseum; Robert helps the zoo's three new adorable tiger cubs.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The boys must catch several large alligators and teach the Mississippi crew wrestling moves before they can return home to Florida; Paul has a dangerous underwater encounter.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul and Jimmy encounter unusually large and ferocious gators; Tre buys a metal detector and soon gets carried away with his hunts for buried treasure.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson works with Sydney, a Bengal, who's welcoming his new stepmom and new pitbull brother into the family by spraying every piece of furniture in the house; an energetic cat, Stella, threatens to harm a toddler.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson needs to find a way to help a distressed cat named Dale whose uncontrollable peeing is driving a wedge between his guardians; it proves nearly impossible for Jackson to get a guilt-stricken guardian to stop feeding her diabetic cat Lasagna.

programme.desc: Tia and her crew race to rescue an abandoned pit bull stranded in an empty house; at Villalobos, Tia's dog Jethro falls dangerously ill while a mother and daughter arrive seeking a new best friend.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade journeys up the Congo River in search of the goliath tiger fish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy sets out to find the possible culprit; a trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On the tropical island of Sulawesi, Indonesia, a tourist snorkeler and several local fishermen have been killed and injured by a mysterious sea creature that impales its victims; Wade travels to the scene to investigate.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a case in Nepal that sounds strangely familiar -- a lone fisherman dragged off his feet and into a mountain river by the original river monster, the goonch catfish.

programme.title: Return of the Cheetah
programme.desc: Wildlife researcher Peter Gros heads to Namibia for a week's assignment at the Cheetah Conservation Fund, an ambitious project aimed at safeguarding the world's fastest sprinter.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, terror grips a fishing community when something in the water leaves a trail of bloody victims in its wake; the only clues they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it left behind.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Wade takes on the biggest investigation of his career -- to unravel what happened to over 1,000 passengers of the RMS Laconia, torpedoed in the mid-Atlantic; he travels the globe, battling giant fish, massive sharks and a deep-sea monster.

programme.desc: Three litters of puppies go from cute to cuter as a trio of Rhodesian Ridgebacks run circles around their mum, Chow Chow puppies bring attitude, and Havanese Lulu has her paws full.

programme.desc: The boys battle a multitude of nuisance gators; Ashley suspects her job is in jeopardy; Paul tries to teach Kayla how to catch alligators by hand.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest Galante visits the island of Java in Indonesia to look for the Javan Tiger; this exotic predator was declared extinct in 2003, but park rangers and locals have had recent sightings and are collecting evidence of its existence.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: After numerous credible eyewitness accounts of the Tasmanian Tiger in Australia, James Cook University has researchers on the move; Forrest joins their study before heading deep into the Cape York Peninsula.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Madagascar's Pachylemurs were red, furry giants, nearly the size of great apes; recently discovered remains disprove that they went extinct 1,000 years ago; Forrest tries to prove the giant species still lives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: On a family trip to the Canadian wilderness, 12-year-old Zac Delventhal is dragged from his sleeping bag by a hungry wolf; while swimming in the Pacific Ocean, Maria Korcsmaros is attacked by a great white shark.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: While working in the Canadian wilderness, Louie van Grootel is attacked by a massive grizzly bear; Travis Kauffman comes face to face with a hungry mountain lion while trail-running in Colorado.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Paul Templer is leading a canoe safari on the Zambezi River near Victoria Falls when a hippopotamus bursts to the surface and drags him into the water; in Texas, an animal pounces on 5-year-old Jade DeMoss.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Nicole Moore's vacation in Cancun, Mexico, gets cut short when a shark attacks her close to shore; in Tennessee, a timber rattlesnake bites firefighter Kyle Watson while he hikes in the woods with his family.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Colorado park ranger Andy Peterson is hiking when he crosses paths with a mountain lion and its prey; in Vancouver, Kari Toft is walking her dog just steps from her home when she is attacked by a vicious raccoon.
